name: unitpulse-portal-tests
description: Unitpulse Portal pytest 自动化测试项目

scripts.clean: node -e "var fs=require('fs'),p=require('path'),d=p.join('tests','report');['screenshots','artifacts','html'].forEach(function(n){var dp=p.join(d,n);if(fs.existsSync(dp))fs.readdirSync(dp).forEach(function(f){fs.rmSync(p.join(dp,f),{recursive:true,force:true})})});['results.json','pytest_results.json'].forEach(function(f){var fp=p.join(d,f);if(fs.existsSync(fp))fs.unlinkSync(fp)});console.log('🧹 日志和产物已清除')"
